narrative:
Pee Pee Township has 2,255 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
